zh.Over Alderley, Cheshire, England, UK: 英國英格蘭爾奧維 阿爾德利
zh.Over Alderley, Cheshire, England: 英國爾奧維 阿爾德利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Petronelle Caverswall於1441年出生在英國爾阿爾德利時，她的父親Piers Caverswall26歲，母親Elizabeth12歲。她於1458年與Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury在英國英格蘭爾奧維 阿爾德利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1490年在英國爾享年49歲。

zh-hans.Over Alderley, Cheshire, England: 英国爾奧維 阿爾德利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Petronelle Caverswall于1441年出生在英国爾阿爾德利时，她的父亲Piers Caverswall26岁，母亲Elizabeth12岁。她于1458年与Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury在英国英格兰爾奧維 阿爾德利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1490年在英国爾享年49岁。

nameMeanings.name: Petronelle
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Rocco, Fedele, Francesco, Marco, Salvatore, Vito.
Italian (southern): from Petronella, a feminine pet form of Petrone or Petronio .

variants.name: Petrone
meanings: From Latin Petronilla, originally a feminine diminutive of the Roman family name Petronius (of uncertain derivation). The name Petronilla was borne by a 1st-century martyr, and early in the Christian era came to be connected with Peter , so that in many legends surrounding her she is described as a companion or even the daughter of St Peter .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Petronelle Caverswall was born in 1441, in Alderley, Cheshire, England, her father, Piers Caverswall, was 26 and her mother, Elizabeth, was 12. She married Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury in 1458, in Over Alderley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1490, in Cheshire, England, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Petronelle Caverswall est née en 1441, à Alderley, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Piers Caverswall, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 12 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury en 1458, à Over Alderley, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1490, à Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.Over Alderley, Cheshire, England, UK: Over Alderley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Petronelle Caverswall 1441 in Alderley, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Piers Caverswall 26 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth 12. Sie hat 1458 in Over Alderley, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1490 im Alter von 49 Jahren in Cheshire, England.

Lei sposato Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury nel 1458, nel Over Alderley, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1490, nel Cheshire, England, all'età di 49 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Petronelle Caverswallが1441年にイギリスチェシュアイアアルダーリーで生まれた時，父Piers Caverswallは26歳，母Elizabethは12歳であった。1458年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー アルダーリーでSir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marburyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1490年にイギリスチェシュアイアで49歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Petronelle Caverswall(이)가 1441년 영국 체실르 알델리에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Piers Caverswall(은)는 26세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 12세였다. 그녀는 1458년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 알델리에서 Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1490년 영국 체실르에서 49세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Petronelle Caverswall nasceu em 1441, em Alderley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Piers Caverswall, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 12 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury em 1458, em Over Alderley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1490, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 49 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Petronelle Caverswall родилась в 1441 г. в местности алдирли, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Piers Caverswall было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 12. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury в 1458 г. в местности овир алдирли, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1490 г. в местности чешир, Англия в возрасте 49 лет.

Se casó con Sir William Henry de Venables of Kinderton, Lord of Marbury en 1458, en Over Alderley, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
